sentences.arabic: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ رَحِيمًا بِكُلِّ الْمَخْلُوقَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, bio je milostiv prema svim stvorenjima.
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) was merciful to all creatures.

sentences.arabic: ذَكَرَ الْبُخَارِيُّ قِصَّةَ الرَّجُلِ الَّذِي سَقَى كَلْبًا عَطْشَانًا فَغَفَرَ اللَّهُ لَهُ.
sentences.translation: Buhari spominje priču o čovjeku koji je napojio žednog psa, pa mu je Allah oprostio grijehe.
sentences.translationEn: Al-Bukhari mentioned the story of a man who gave water to a thirsty dog, so Allah forgave him.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «فِي كُلِّ كَبِدٍ رَطْبَةٍ أَجْرٌ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ المَسَاقَاةِ، رَقْم ٢٣٦٣].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, rekao je: 'U svakom živom biću postoji nagrada' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o natapanju, br. 2363].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'In every living being there is a reward' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of Watering, No. 2363].

sentences.arabic: الإِسْلَامُ يَدْعُونَا إِلَى الرِّفْقِ بِالْحَيَوَانِ وَعَدَمِ تَعْذِيبِهِ.
sentences.translation: Islam nas poziva na blagost prema životinjama i zabranjuje njihovo mučenje.
sentences.translationEn: Islam calls us to be kind to animals and not to mistreat them.

sentences.arabic: الرَّحْمَةُ جُزْءٌ أَسَاسِيٌّ مِنْ إِيمَانِ الْمُؤْمِنِ.
sentences.translation: Milost je osnovni dio vjernikovog imana.
sentences.translationEn: Mercy is an essential part of a believer's faith.
